Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: this is a detailed scenario comparing two hiring process logs with clear structural differences

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: first I need to identify the core issue Group B applies a score adjustment based on professional association membership while Group A doesnt Thats the key difference

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The bias manifests through disparate treatment candidates with the same qualifications get different outcomes purely based on network affiliation

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE
Text: Should highlight how this creates an unfair advantage unrelated to job performance

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE
Text: For fairness implications need to cover both fairness definitions distributive procedural and real world consequences like network perpetuation of advantage

Name: Deductive Reasoning - IND
Text: The legal angle is relevant too since this could violate anti discrimination principles

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: The response should be structured clear bias identification concrete manifestations in the data then layered implications from ethical to practical Avoid overcomplicating stick to what the logs show directly
